author: linh
text: chào mn! ok so it's official — AIV's first ever charity fair is happening 🎉 kicking off planning this week

text: first fair ever, no pressure 😅

text: big things to sort: venue, date, budget. venue first — mình sẽ shortlist a few options today mai

text: ok poll time: which slot works best for the kids' families? sat morning, sat afternoon, or sun morning?

author: khoa
text: from the volunteer side: sat morning we have the most teachers available. sunday is thin, half our people have family stuff

author: tuan
text: sat morning ok for me. sat afternoon i have uni lab

text: great, matches khoa's read. let it sit overnight, quyết mai nhé

author: tuan
text: one more data point: Minh Anh's mom says sunday is family day, sat morning best for them too

author: linh
text: venue shortlist so far: Phuong Liet Community Center, Thanh Xuan Cultural House, and maybe the yard at Ngoc Ha primary. để mình call them today

author: duc
text: school yard = no rain plan, careful

author: an
text: random but our follower count just passed 800 🎉

author: mai
text: !decision weekly classes are locked to Saturday 09:00 starting this week. families prefer sat morning and that's when we have the most volunteers. mình sẽ báo the parents in zalo

author: khoa

author: linh

author: linh
text: ok slept on it. comparing: Thanh Xuan 5tr + deposit, school yard free but no rain plan and can't reach the principal, Phuong Liet CC 1tr2 with tables/chairs and actually available. going with Phuong Liet Community Center for the fair

author: linh
text: wrap-up for the week: venue chốt — Phuong Liet Community Center, 1tr2/day incl tables+chairs, penciled in for two candidate weekends, final date due within 2 weeks. duc secured 2 free speakers + van transport, minh has poster v1 going. next week: pick the date + first budget draft

text: good week team 🍻

author: huong
text: ok, need the group's brain — donation channel for the fair: Momo or bank transfer? we have to decide this week because the QR standees go to print

author: an
text: Momo no? literally everyone under 30 has it, zero friction

author: minh
text: momo +1, I can design a cute standee around the pink

author: huong
text: my worry: Momo would sit on someone's personal wallet, and exporting a clean statement is painful. for the finance report I need every donation traceable — who, when, how much, all in one place

author: an
text: hmm fair… last year's reconciliation was a nightmare, chi Yen's handover notes literally say 'never again' 💀

author: phuong
text: calling it: we go VietQR bank transfer on the club account. every donation lands in one account with sender name + note attached, so the finance report basically writes itself — traceability wins over convenience here. Momo only as a fallback for people who really can't do a transfer

author: huong
text: perfect. I'll generate the VietQR today and send minh the code for the standee

author: minh
text: ok bank QR standee then, nhé. less pink, more trust 😌

text: will add the QR to the FB event page too once it exists

author: mai
text: ok let's make it an actual rule then: buddy system. every new volunteer gets paired with an experienced mentor for their first 2 sessions — they shadow first, then co-teach. khoa, can you assign the pairs whenever someone new signs up?

author: linh
text: báo xấu mọi người. just got off the phone with Phuong Liet CC — new management, and the rent for our fair day is now 2tr4. that's DOUBLE the 1tr2 we agreed two weeks ago

author: duc
text: WHAT. doubled?? does it at least still include tables and chairs

author: linh
text: 'to be confirmed' 🙃 they said the old quote is void under new management

author: duc
text: also when i did the site check the AC in the main hall was dead, and they told me no fix before end of august. august heat + no AC + 200 people = 🥵

author: linh
text: so we'd pay DOUBLE for a hall everyone melts in. not loving this

author: khoa
text: what about Nguyen Du School gym? we run our weekend classes there, the vice principal likes us. and it's indoor so no rain-plan problem like the yard idea

author: linh
text: ooh. để mình call their admin office now

author: minh
text: if we move venues i need to know soon, the venue name goes on the poster 👀

author: linh
text: update: talked to the Nguyen Du admin. gym is FREE for aug 2 — community partner rate, 0đ. big ceiling fans that actually work, and we can use the yard for outdoor stalls. they just want a banner credit as school partner

author: duc
text: that's… better than Phuong Liet even before the price hike

author: linh
text: ok chốt: we move the fair to Nguyen Du School gym. for the record: Phuong Liet doubled the fee to 2tr4 AND their AC is broken with no fix before end of august — double the price for a sauna is a no. Nguyen Du gym is free, the fans work, indoor means rain plan sorted, and there's yard space for extra stalls. mình sẽ cancel Phuong Liet and sign with the school tomorrow
